---
title: "10 Initialization (The Equilibrium)"
---

## 10.1 Spin-up/Initializing approaches

-   Cold start
-   Warm start

## 10.2 Spin-up Process

-   Spin-up Tec event
-   State-of-the world output Worldfile
-   Determining baseline equilibrium
-   Typical spin-up output variables
-   Spin-up simulation output files








#
